services.name: Fog Light
services.shortDesc: High-performance fog lights for superior visibility in poor weather conditions.
services.fullDesc: Premium fog lights designed to cut through fog, rain, and mist. Available for all car models with OEM-quality fitment and professional installation for maximum road safety.

services.name: Fog Light LED
services.shortDesc: Ultra-bright LED fog lights with low power consumption and long lifespan.
services.fullDesc: Upgrade to energy-efficient LED fog lights that deliver crisp, bright illumination. Available in multiple color temperatures with plug-and-play installation for most car models.

services.name: Fog Wiring Kit
services.shortDesc: Complete fog light wiring harness with relay, switch & connectors.
services.fullDesc: Professional-grade fog light wiring kits including relay, fuse, switch, and all necessary connectors. Ensures safe and reliable fog light operation with clean installation.

services.name: Head Light
services.shortDesc: Premium headlight assemblies and upgrades for enhanced road visibility.
services.fullDesc: Complete headlight assemblies and upgrade kits including projector setups, DRL integration, and sequential turn signals. Transform your car's front look while improving night driving safety.

services.name: Halogen Bulb
services.shortDesc: High-performance halogen bulbs with brighter, whiter light output.
services.fullDesc: Premium halogen replacement bulbs delivering up to 150% more light than standard bulbs. Available in various wattages and color temperatures for headlights, fog lights, and auxiliary lamps.

services.name: LED Light
services.shortDesc: Universal LED lights for interior, exterior, and accent lighting.
services.fullDesc: Versatile LED lighting solutions for every part of your car — from interior dome lights to exterior accent strips. Long-lasting, energy-efficient, and available in multiple colors.

services.name: Parking Bulb
services.shortDesc: LED and halogen parking light bulbs for clear visibility while parked.
services.fullDesc: High-quality parking light bulbs in LED and halogen variants. Ensures your vehicle is visible when parked in low-light conditions. Easy plug-and-play replacement for all car models.

services.name: Fog Projector
services.shortDesc: Bi-xenon & LED projector fog lights for focused, powerful beam output.
services.fullDesc: High-end fog projector lamps with focused beam patterns that illuminate the road without blinding oncoming traffic. Available in bi-xenon and LED options with universal mounting brackets.

services.name: Roof Light
services.shortDesc: Interior roof-mounted LED lights for elegant cabin illumination.
services.fullDesc: Premium roof-mounted cabin lights with LED technology. Choose from single-color or RGB multi-color options with dimming controls for a luxurious cabin ambiance.

services.name: Door Light
services.shortDesc: Welcome door lights with logo projection and puddle lighting.
services.fullDesc: Stylish door lights that project your car's logo on the ground when the door opens. Also available as puddle lights and door sill illumination for a premium entry experience.

services.name: Ambient Light
services.shortDesc: Multi-color ambient lighting strips for a luxurious cabin atmosphere.
services.fullDesc: Transform your car's interior with ambient LED lighting strips. Available in single-color and RGB options with app control, music sync, and multiple brightness levels for the perfect mood.

services.name: Cabin Light
services.shortDesc: Bright LED cabin reading and courtesy lights for interior comfort.
services.fullDesc: Upgrade your factory cabin lights to bright, cool-white LEDs. Includes dome lights, map lights, and courtesy lights. Plug-and-play replacement with no modifications needed.

services.name: Android Stereo
services.shortDesc: Latest Android head units with GPS, Bluetooth & touchscreen display.
services.fullDesc: Install the latest Android car stereos featuring large HD touchscreens, GPS navigation, Bluetooth connectivity, Wi-Fi, rear camera integration, and app support. Compatible with all car models.

services.name: Dash Camera
services.shortDesc: HD dash cameras with night vision, loop recording & G-sensor.
services.fullDesc: High-definition dash cameras for front and rear recording. Features include night vision, loop recording, G-sensor for accident detection, parking mode, and smartphone app connectivity.

services.name: Front & Back Camera
services.shortDesc: 360° parking cameras with front and rear HD recording capability.
services.fullDesc: Complete front and rear camera solutions with HD resolution, wide-angle lens, and parking guidelines. Ensures full visibility around your vehicle for safe parking and reversing.

services.name: Android Auto Head Unit
services.shortDesc: Dedicated Android Auto head units with seamless smartphone integration.
services.fullDesc: Android Auto-compatible head units that mirror your phone's navigation, calls, messages, and music directly on the car display. Voice-controlled with Google Assistant support.

services.name: Apple CarPlay Head Unit
services.shortDesc: Apple CarPlay head units with wireless connectivity & Siri support.
services.fullDesc: Premium Apple CarPlay-compatible head units supporting wireless and wired connection. Access Apple Maps, Music, Messages, and Siri directly from your car's touchscreen display.

services.name: Audio System
services.shortDesc: Complete car audio systems with speakers, amplifiers & subwoofers.
services.fullDesc: Full car audio system packages from entry-level to audiophile grade. Includes component speakers, amplifiers, subwoofers, and sound processors from top brands like Sony, JBL, Pioneer, and Bose.

services.name: Speakers
services.shortDesc: Premium coaxial & component speakers for crystal-clear car audio.
services.fullDesc: High-quality car speakers in coaxial and component configurations. Available from brands like Sony, JBL, Bose, Clarion, Pioneer, and Alpine. Professional fitting and tuning included.

services.name: Car Stereo
services.shortDesc: Single & double DIN car stereos with USB, AUX & Bluetooth.
services.fullDesc: Wide range of car stereos from basic single DIN units to advanced double DIN touchscreen players. Features include USB, AUX, Bluetooth, FM/AM radio, and smartphone connectivity.

services.name: Steering Control OE
services.shortDesc: OE steering wheel audio controls integration for aftermarket stereos.
services.fullDesc: Retain your factory steering wheel audio controls with aftermarket head units. Our OE-compatible adapters ensure seamless integration of volume, track, and call controls.

services.name: GPS Navigation
services.shortDesc: Dedicated GPS systems and car tracker solutions for all vehicles.
services.fullDesc: Install dedicated GPS navigation systems or real-time car tracking devices. Perfect for fleet management, security, or just always knowing where you are. Supports live tracking via smartphone app.

services.name: Tyre Pressure Monitor
services.shortDesc: TPMS sensors with real-time tyre pressure and temperature display.
services.fullDesc: Tyre Pressure Monitoring Systems (TPMS) with real-time display of pressure and temperature for all four tyres. Alerts you instantly to under-inflation, preventing blowouts and improving fuel efficiency.

services.name: Seat Covers
services.shortDesc: Premium 7D, leather & fabric seat covers with precision fit for all models.
services.fullDesc: Wide range of premium car seat covers including 7D mat covers, genuine leather, PU leather, and custom fabric options. Each cover is tailored for a precise fit with professional installation.

services.name: Nappa Seat Cover
services.shortDesc: Premium Nappa leather seat covers with butter-soft feel and durability.
services.fullDesc: Luxurious Nappa leather seat covers offering a butter-soft touch with exceptional durability. Available in a wide range of colors with custom stitching, quilting, and perforation patterns.

services.name: Leather Seat Cover
services.shortDesc: Genuine and PU leather seat covers with embossed personalization.
services.fullDesc: High-quality genuine and PU leather seat covers with options for custom embossing of your name, initials, or logo. Available in multiple colors, textures, and stitching patterns.

services.name: Floor Mat
services.shortDesc: 7D & 3D custom floor mats with anti-slip backing for all car models.
services.fullDesc: High-quality car floor mats custom-fit for your vehicle. Features anti-slip backing, waterproof surface, and easy cleaning. Available in 3D, 7D, and 9D variants for all makes and models.

services.name: 3D Mat
services.shortDesc: Precision-molded 3D floor mats with raised edges for spill protection.
services.fullDesc: 3D molded floor mats designed to perfectly contour your car's floor. Raised edges trap water, mud, and debris. Made from durable, eco-friendly materials with anti-slip backing.

services.name: 9D Mat
services.shortDesc: Premium 9D full-coverage floor mats with luxury diamond stitching.
services.fullDesc: Top-of-the-line 9D floor mats offering complete floor coverage including the sides. Features luxury diamond stitching, waterproof base, and premium materials for a high-end interior look.

services.name: 7D Mat
services.shortDesc: Multi-layer 7D floor mats with superior protection and elegant finish.
services.fullDesc: 7D floor mats with multi-layer construction for superior protection. Combines grass mat, XPE foam, and leather layers for waterproofing, sound dampening, and elegant appearance.

services.name: Rubber Mat
services.shortDesc: Heavy-duty rubber floor mats with deep grooves for all-weather use.
services.fullDesc: Durable rubber floor mats with deep grooves to trap water, mud, and snow. Perfect for all-weather protection. Easy to clean with a simple hose-down. Available for all car models.

services.name: Steering Cover
services.shortDesc: Premium leather & fabric steering wheel covers for comfort and grip.
services.fullDesc: Professional steering wheel covers in leather, suede, and fabric. Custom stitching options available. Improves grip, comfort, and the overall look of your steering wheel.

services.name: Handle Cover
services.shortDesc: Protective handle covers to prevent scratches and improve grip.
services.fullDesc: Soft silicone and leather handle covers that protect door handles from scratches while providing a better grip. Available in multiple colors to match your car's interior.

services.name: Parcel Tray
services.shortDesc: OE-quality parcel trays for boot organization and privacy.
services.fullDesc: High-quality parcel trays that cover the boot area, keeping your cargo hidden and organized. Made from durable materials with a clean factory finish. Available for hatchbacks and SUVs.

services.name: Power Window Switch
services.shortDesc: Replacement power window switches with OE-quality fit and finish.
services.fullDesc: OE-quality replacement power window switches for all car models. Direct plug-and-play fitment with durable construction for long-lasting performance.

services.name: Door Inner Handle
services.shortDesc: Replacement interior door handles with chrome and matte finishes.
services.fullDesc: High-quality replacement interior door handles available in chrome, matte, and piano black finishes. Direct OE replacement with no modifications needed.

services.name: Door Pad Lining
services.shortDesc: Premium door pad linings with fabric, leather, and custom finishes.
services.fullDesc: Upgrade or replace your door pad linings with premium fabric, leather, or custom materials. Restores worn interiors and adds a luxurious touch to your car's doors.

services.name: Armrest
services.shortDesc: Comfortable armrests with storage compartment for driver convenience.
services.fullDesc: Ergonomic car armrests with built-in storage compartments. Adjustable height and angle for maximum comfort on long drives. Available in leather and fabric finishes for all car models.

services.name: Dashboard Lining
services.shortDesc: Premium leather dashboard wrapping for a luxurious cabin feel.
services.fullDesc: Transform your car's interior with a professional dashboard leather wrap. Using premium grade leather and precision cutting, we wrap your dashboard, door panels, and centre console for a luxurious finish.

services.name: Luxury Perfumes
services.shortDesc: Premium car perfumes and air fresheners for a pleasant cabin experience.
services.fullDesc: Luxury car perfumes and air freshener systems that keep your cabin smelling fresh and inviting. Available in a wide range of premium fragrances with long-lasting formulas.

services.name: Horn
services.shortDesc: Powerful car horns with deep, attention-grabbing sound output.
services.fullDesc: High-performance car horns delivering loud, clear sound. Available in single and dual-tone variants from brands like Bosch, Hella, and FIAMM. Easy installation with universal fitment.

services.name: Rat Mesh
services.shortDesc: Stainless steel rat mesh guards to protect engine bay from rodents.
services.fullDesc: High-grade stainless steel mesh screens that block rats and rodents from entering your engine bay through air vents and gaps. Essential protection for parked vehicles.

services.name: Horn Cut Outer
services.shortDesc: Horn cut outer covers for a clean, factory-finished bumper look.
services.fullDesc: Premium horn cut outer covers that provide a clean, finished look to your bumper after horn installation. Available in chrome and color-matched options for all car models.

services.name: Horn Relay
services.shortDesc: Heavy-duty horn relays for reliable horn operation and wiring protection.
services.fullDesc: High-quality horn relays that ensure reliable horn operation while protecting your car's wiring from overload. Essential for aftermarket horn installations.

services.name: Front Grill
services.shortDesc: Custom front grills in chrome, matte, and sport mesh designs.
services.fullDesc: Transform your car's front appearance with custom grills. Available in chrome, matte black, honeycomb mesh, and sport designs. Direct replacement with OE fitment quality.

services.name: Rear Bumper
services.shortDesc: Rear bumper guards and replacement bumpers for protection and style.
services.fullDesc: Premium rear bumper guards and full replacement bumpers. Protects your car's rear from parking dents and scratches while enhancing the sporty look. Available for all models.

services.name: Rear Safety Guard
services.shortDesc: Heavy-duty rear safety guards for SUVs and sedans.
services.fullDesc: Robust rear safety guards that protect your car's rear end from collisions and parking damage. Made from stainless steel and alloy with chrome or matte black finish.

services.name: Handle Chrome
services.shortDesc: Chrome door handle garnish covers for a premium exterior look.
services.fullDesc: High-quality chrome door handle covers that add a premium touch to your car's exterior. Made from ABS with triple chrome plating for a long-lasting, rust-free shine.

services.name: Headlight Chrome
services.shortDesc: Chrome headlight garnish for a bold, upscale front-end appearance.
services.fullDesc: Decorative chrome headlight garnish that frames your headlights for an upscale look. Made from durable ABS plastic with high-quality chrome finish. Model-specific fitment.

services.name: Door Handle Chrome
services.shortDesc: Full chrome door handle covers with precise model-specific fitment.
services.fullDesc: Complete chrome door handle cover sets with precise fitment for your specific car model. Easy peel-and-stick installation with 3M adhesive backing.

services.name: Lower Chrome Garnish
services.shortDesc: Chrome lower body garnish strips for a refined side profile.
services.fullDesc: Elegant chrome garnish strips for your car's lower body line. Adds a refined, premium touch to the side profile. Strong adhesive backing for a secure, lasting fit.

services.name: Monogram Kit
services.shortDesc: Complete monogram and badge kits for brand identity and styling.
services.fullDesc: OE-quality monogram and badge kits for your car. Includes brand logos, model names, and variant badges. Available in chrome, matte, and black finishes with 3M adhesive.

services.name: Flag Post
services.shortDesc: Premium flag posts for official and decorative car flag display.
services.fullDesc: High-quality car flag posts for fender or bonnet mounting. Used for official flags, decorative pennants, and national emblems. Available in chrome and stainless steel.

services.name: Post Clamp
services.shortDesc: Durable flag post clamps for secure mounting on all vehicles.
services.fullDesc: Heavy-duty flag post clamps designed for secure and vibration-free mounting. Universal fitment with adjustable sizing for different post diameters.

services.name: Wheel Cups
services.shortDesc: Stylish wheel cups and hub caps for a refreshed wheel appearance.
services.fullDesc: Premium wheel cups and hub caps that instantly refresh your car's wheel appearance. Available in various designs — from sporty to elegant — with secure clip-on fitment.

services.name: Sun Control Film
services.shortDesc: UV-blocking window tints & solar films for heat and glare control.
services.fullDesc: Professional window tinting with premium solar control films. Blocks harmful UV rays, reduces heat, controls glare, and adds privacy. Available in various shades from 3M, SolarGard, and Llumar.

services.name: Sun Control Sheet
services.shortDesc: Pre-cut sun control sheets for easy DIY windshield and window application.
services.fullDesc: Pre-cut sun control sheets available in various tint levels for windshield and side windows. Easy application with clear installation instructions. Reduces cabin temperature significantly.

services.name: Windshield Glass
services.shortDesc: OE-quality windshield glass replacement for all car models.
services.fullDesc: High-quality windshield glass replacement with OE specifications. Includes laminated safety glass with proper fitment, sealant, and professional installation for all car makes and models.

services.name: Windshield Anti-Glare Film
services.shortDesc: Anti-glare windshield films to reduce sun glare and eye strain.
services.fullDesc: Premium anti-glare windshield films that reduce harsh sun glare while maintaining clear visibility. Protects driver's eyes from strain during daytime and oncoming headlight glare at night.

services.name: Paint Protection Film
services.shortDesc: Self-healing PPF wraps to protect your car paint from scratches.
services.fullDesc: Protect your car's paint with premium Paint Protection Film (PPF). Self-healing technology absorbs scratches and swirl marks. Nearly invisible coating preserves factory finish for years.

services.name: Bonnet Damping
services.shortDesc: Heat and sound insulation pads for the bonnet/hood area.
services.fullDesc: Premium bonnet damping pads that insulate your engine bay from heat and reduce noise. Protects the bonnet paint from heat damage while keeping the cabin quieter.

services.name: Car Damping
services.shortDesc: Sound deadening & vibration control mats for a quieter cabin.
services.fullDesc: Reduce road noise and vibration with professional car damping installation. Premium butyl rubber sound deadening mats on doors, floor, trunk, and roof for a significantly quieter driving experience.

services.name: Underchassis Coating
services.shortDesc: Anti-rust underbody coating for long-lasting chassis protection.
services.fullDesc: Professional underchassis anti-rust coating that protects your car's underside from corrosion, road salt, and stone chips. Rubberized coating provides a durable, long-lasting barrier.

services.name: Door Nano Sticker
services.shortDesc: Nano-tech door edge protectors to prevent chips and scratches.
services.fullDesc: Transparent nano-technology door edge stickers that protect against chips, scratches, and minor dents from door edges hitting walls or other cars. Virtually invisible once applied.

services.name: All Type of Glass
services.shortDesc: Replacement glass for all windows — front, rear, side & quarter.
services.fullDesc: Complete range of replacement glass for every window of your car. Includes front windshield, rear windshield, side windows, and quarter glass. OE-quality with proper fitment and sealing.

services.name: Wiper Pipe
services.shortDesc: Replacement wiper fluid pipes and connectors for all car models.
services.fullDesc: High-quality replacement wiper fluid pipes, nozzles, and connectors. Ensures proper washer fluid flow to your windshield for clear visibility. Universal and model-specific options available.

services.name: Wiper Tank
services.shortDesc: Replacement windshield washer fluid tanks with pump motors.
services.fullDesc: OE-quality replacement washer fluid tanks with integrated pump motors. Available for all car makes and models. Includes all mounting hardware and connectors.

services.name: Wiper Blade
services.shortDesc: Premium wiper blades with streak-free cleaning in all weather.
services.fullDesc: High-performance wiper blades from top brands offering streak-free cleaning in rain, snow, and dust. Available in conventional, flat, and hybrid styles for all car models.

services.name: Sub Mirror
services.shortDesc: Replacement sub-mirror glass plates for all car models.
services.fullDesc: Precise replacement sub-mirror glass plates with anti-glare and convex options. Direct fitment for all car makes and models. Restores full rearward visibility safely.

services.name: Side Mirror Set
services.shortDesc: Complete side mirror assemblies with electric adjustment and indicators.
services.fullDesc: Complete side mirror replacement sets with electric adjustment, auto-fold, integrated turn indicators, and heating options. OE-quality fitment for all car models.

services.name: Mirror Cap
services.shortDesc: Stylish mirror caps in chrome, carbon fiber, and gloss black.
services.fullDesc: Upgrade your side mirrors with premium replacement caps in chrome, carbon fiber, matte, or gloss black finishes. Clip-on or replacement style for easy installation.

services.name: Rear Wiper Arm
services.shortDesc: Replacement rear wiper arms with blade for hatchbacks and SUVs.
services.fullDesc: OE-quality rear wiper arm assemblies with blade for hatchbacks and SUVs. Direct replacement with proper fitment. Restores effective rear window cleaning performance.

services.name: Wheel Arch
services.shortDesc: Wheel arch cladding and fender liners for off-road protection.
services.fullDesc: Durable wheel arch cladding and fender liners that protect against mud, debris, and stone chips. Available in textured black and body-color matched options for SUVs and sedans.

services.name: Dent Removing
services.shortDesc: Paintless dent removal service for minor dents and dings.
services.fullDesc: Professional paintless dent removal (PDR) service that restores your car's body panels to their original shape without affecting the factory paint. Perfect for hail damage, door dings, and minor dents.

services.name: Side Step
services.shortDesc: Running boards and side steps for easy SUV and MPV entry.
services.fullDesc: Premium side steps and running boards for SUVs, MPVs, and trucks. Made from aluminum or stainless steel with anti-slip surface. Provides easy vehicle entry while adding a bold look.

services.name: Foot Step
services.shortDesc: Durable foot steps with anti-skid surface for safe boarding.
services.fullDesc: Heavy-duty foot steps with textured anti-skid surface for safe entry and exit. Available in chrome, matte black, and illuminated options for SUVs and trucks.

services.name: Footstep Plate
services.shortDesc: Stainless steel footstep plates with illuminated logos for door sills.
services.fullDesc: Premium door sill footstep plates in stainless steel with or without LED illumination. Protects door sills from scuff marks while adding a premium touch with your car's logo.

services.name: Crash Guard
services.shortDesc: Premium front crash guards and rear boot packs for style & protection.
services.fullDesc: High-quality front crash guards, skid plates, and rear boot packs. Available for all SUVs and sedans. Provides both aesthetic enhancement and real physical protection.

services.name: Door Visor
services.shortDesc: Rain visors for windows allowing fresh air circulation in rain.
services.fullDesc: Premium door visors (rain guards) that allow you to keep windows slightly open during rain for fresh air circulation. Made from durable acrylic with chrome trim. Available for all models.

services.name: Sun Visor
services.shortDesc: Replacement and extended sun visors for better sun glare protection.
services.fullDesc: High-quality sun visors with mirror and light options. Available as direct replacements or clip-on extensions for better glare protection during sunrise and sunset driving.

services.name: Door Edge Guard
services.shortDesc: Protective door edge guards to prevent dents and paint chips.
services.fullDesc: Durable door edge guards that protect your car doors from dents and paint chips when opening in tight spaces. Available in chrome, transparent, and color-matched options.

services.name: Finger Guard
services.shortDesc: Child safety finger guards to prevent door pinch injuries.
services.fullDesc: Essential safety accessory that prevents fingers from getting pinched in car doors. Especially important for families with children. Easy installation with no drilling required.

services.name: Door Cladding
services.shortDesc: Decorative door cladding and side body molding for protection.
services.fullDesc: Premium door cladding and side body molding strips that protect your car's lower body from stone chips and minor scrapes while adding a stylish accent line.

services.name: Sunroof / Moonroof
services.shortDesc: Aftermarket sunroof installation for ultimate open-air driving.
services.fullDesc: Factory-quality aftermarket sunroof installation. We install panoramic and standard sunroofs with professional sealing and finishing for a leak-free, clean look.
